en.extract:
The white-eared bronze cuckoo (Chalcites meyerii) is a species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae. It was formerly placed in the genus Chrysococcyx.
It is found in New Guinea.

The '''white-eared bronze cuckoo''' ('''''Chalcites meyerii''''') is a species of [[cuckoo]] in the family [[Cuculidae]]. It was formerly placed in the [[genus]] ''[[Chrysococcyx]]''.
It is found in [[New Guinea]].
